name: research-plugin
description: Lean Codex research-state workflow with MCP-controlled memory, permissions, resources, and ML jobs.

interface.shortDescription: Claims, experiments, repo-file resources, and ML jobs
interface.longDescription: A lean research-state plug-in where Codex operates through skills and an MCP server controls durable memory, permissioned mutations, resource sync, workflow state, adversarial review records, and reliable ML job execution.
defaultPrompt: Use Research Plugin to plan an experiment.
Use Research Plugin to run and review this experiment.
Use Research Plugin to sync resources and update claims.
